title: XPeng Inc (XPEV) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Deliveries and Margin Improvements
text: XPeng achieved significant growth with 46,533 units in Q3 2024, a 54% increase quarter over quarter and a 16% increase year over year. Total revenue reached RMB10.1 billion, representing an 18.4% increase year over year and a 24.5% increase quarter over quarter. Vehicle sales revenue was RMB8.8 billion, up 12.1% annually and 29% quarterly. Services revenue surged 90.7% year-over-year to RMB1.31 billion. The company showed substantial margin expansion with gross profit margin of 15.3% in Q3 2024, up from 14% in Q2 2024 and negative 2.7% in Q3 2023. Vehicle-specific margins improved to 8.6% compared to negative 6.1% in the prior year period. Net loss narrowed to RMB1.81 billion versus RMB3.89 billion in Q3 2023. Cash reserves reached RMB35.75 billion as of September 30, 2024. R&D expenses increased 25.1% year-over-year to RMB1.63 billion. Management indicated the successful P7+ launch with firm orders exceeding 30,000 and expects to achieve profitability by year-end 2025.
